title: vitis capensis
intro: Vitis capensis, also known as the Cape grapevine, is a species of flowering plant in the grapevine family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis capensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Vitis capensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
